message:
bench(core): add native_events_latency benchmark for native-wezterm feature

Add a Criterion benchmark (165 LOC) measuring end-to-end latency of the
native WezTerm event pipeline — from event emission through the mux
bridge to capture ingest:

native_events_latency.rs:
- Benchmarks event dispatch latency under varying concurrency levels
  (1, 4, 16 producer tasks) to characterize scaling behavior
- Measures round-trip time from native event construction through
  the runtime event bus to the capture task acknowledgement
- Uses async_tokio Criterion adapter for realistic async scheduling

Cargo.toml (+5 lines):
- Register `native_events_latency` bench target with `harness = false`
  and `required-features = ["native-wezterm"]` to gate on the native
  WezTerm integration being available

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -245,6 +245,11 @@ harness = false
 name = "irl_bench"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "native_events_latency"
+harness = false
+required-features = ["native-wezterm"]
+
 [features]
 default = []
 # Public feature flags (stable surface)
